Overview Compliance Centre Social Procurement Management Approach Testimonials Case Studies

Due Diligence Hub

Everything procurement needs.
No request required.

All of CPC's compliance credentials, certifications, management documentation and client references, structured for formal procurement evaluation.

Organised by the four standard assessment categories: compliance and certification, social procurement, operational capability, and verified outcomes.

Compliance Centre

ISO 9001, 14001 and 45001 certificates, JAS-ANZ accreditation details, audit records and all insurance documentation.

View →

Social Procurement

Modern Slavery Act compliance, Indigenous employment and procurement, workforce diversity and Commonwealth IPP documentation.

View →

Management Approach

Operating systems, technology platforms, workforce management model, contract management and continuous improvement frameworks.

View →

Testimonials

Client references and testimonials from government, education and commercial sectors. Verified references available on request.

View →

Case Studies

Verified outcomes from the national portfolio across government, industrial, education and carbon neutral contracts.

View →

Contact for References

Direct contact for procurement reference checks. Same-sector references available: government, industrial and education.

View →

Tell us about your sector and sites. We'll design a compliance-driven cleaning program around your obligations and schedule.

  • ✓ Site assessment included
  • ✓ Sector-specific proposal
  • ✓ Response within 5 business days

  • ✓ Modern slavery statement
